calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar May-20-2014 Continued To Jun-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bruce Friedman for and with Carolyn Kenady.

Mr. Friedman stated that they obtained a press release from Securities and Exchange regarding the Leg Mason Partners Equity Fund confirming the merger and showing change in name from The Leeman Corporation. Ms. Kenady stated that she has a letter that was sent to her Father with instructions to the share holders. Mr. Friedman also stated that they can deal with the New America account by way of 13100. The Court once again reminded Counsel that information regarding percentages of the JP Morgan shares to Trust-A and to Trust-B is needed. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets was continued to June 24, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar May-06-2014 Continued To May-20-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Continued To May-06-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bruce Friedman for and with Carolyn Kenady.

The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets was continued to May 6, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a supplemental declaration setting forth who the Trustee of Trust-B is, from what source the New America Income Fund was purchased and how the JP Morgan stock was split between Trust-A and Trust-B.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-08-2014 Continued To Apr-22-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
